name: generate-ai-answer
description: Generate AI reference answer for a question based on its skill's answer template. Use this skill when the user asks to generate AI answer for a specific question ID.

arguments.name: question_id
arguments.description: The question ID to generate AI answer for

arguments.name: max_words
arguments.description: Maximum words for the answer (default: 500 for 5-minute answer)

arguments.name: mode
arguments.description: Mode: preview (save to notes/ai) or run (save to database)
